offer: For property managers processing 5–15 eviction notices/month, inefficient preparation causes legal delays. We streamline the summary process instead of manual preparation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient preparation of eviction notices and rent arrears summaries.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try template-based eviction notice generation and summary report on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
